elements.title: lang::report_page_064_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_qa.id                        as quiz_attempt_id,
       kbi_c.fullname                   AS course_name,
       kbi_q.name                       AS quiz_name,
       kbi_u.id,
       kbi_u.firstname,
       kbi_u.lastname,
       kbi_u.email,
       kbi_qa.attempt                   AS all_att,
       attm.highest_grade,
       attm.lowest_grade,
       kbi_qa.timefinish - kbi_qa.timestart AS timespend,
       kbi_ue.enrol_status              AS enrol_status,
       kbi_ue.timeend,
       kbi_qa.state                     AS completion_state,
       attm.latest_submission,
       kbi_q.sumgrades                  AS marksmax,
       kbi_q.grade                      AS grademax,
       kbi_qa.sumgrades                 AS finalgrade,
       attm.first_completed_date,
       kbi_gi.gradepass                 AS gradepass,
       kbi_cmc.timemodified             AS timemodified,
       kbi_u.deleted,
       kbi_u.suspended,
       kbi_u.username
FROM mdl_quiz_attempts kbi_qa
       JOIN (SELECT kbi_qa1.quiz,
                    kbi_qa1.userid,
                    COUNT(kbi_qa1.id)                                                        AS at_cont,
                    (MAX(kbi_qa1.sumgrades) / kbi_q1.sumgrades) * 100                            AS highest_grade,
                    (MIN(kbi_qa1.sumgrades) / kbi_q1.sumgrades) * 100                            AS lowest_grade,
                    MAX(CASE WHEN kbi_qa1.state = 'finished' THEN kbi_qa1.timefinish ELSE 0 END) AS latest_submission,
                    MIN(kbi_qa1.timefinish)                                                  AS first_completed_date
             FROM mdl_quiz_attempts kbi_qa1
                    JOIN mdl_quiz kbi_q1 ON kbi_q1.id = kbi_qa1.quiz
             GROUP BY kbi_qa1.quiz, kbi_qa1.userid, kbi_q1.sumgrades) attm ON attm.quiz = kbi_qa.quiz AND attm.userid = kbi_qa.userid
       JOIN mdl_quiz kbi_q ON kbi_q.id = kbi_qa.quiz
       JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = kbi_qa.userid
       JOIN (SELECT kbi_e.courseid, kbi_ue.userid, MIN(kbi_ue.status) AS enrol_status, MIN(kbi_ue.timeend) AS timeend
             FROM mdl_enrol kbi_e
                    JOIN mdl_user_enrolments kbi_ue ON kbi_ue.enrolid = kbi_e.id
             GROUP BY kbi_e.courseid, kbi_ue.userid) ue ON kbi_ue.courseid = kbi_q.course AND kbi_ue.userid = kbi_u.id
       JOIN mdl_modules kbi_m ON kbi_m.name = 'quiz'
       JOIN mdl_course_modules kbi_cm ON kbi_cm.course = kbi_q.course AND kbi_cm.module = kbi_m.id AND kbi_cm.instance = kbi_q.id
       JOIN mdl_grade_items kbi_gi ON kbi_gi.itemmodule = 'quiz' AND kbi_gi.iteminstance = kbi_q.id
       JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_cm.course
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course_modules_completion kbi_cmc
         ON kbi_cmc.coursemoduleid = kbi_cm.id AND kbi_cmc.completionstate IN (1, 2) AND
            kbi_cmc.userid = kbi_qa.userid
WHERE kbi_q.id = :courseid
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username != 'guest'
